name: unit-converter-ai
description: Unit Converter Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: convert_length
tools.description: Convert between length units: mm, cm, m, km, inch, foot, yard, mile, nautical_mile, light_year.

tools.name: convert_weight
tools.description: Convert between weight units: mg, g, kg, tonne, oz, lb, stone, ton_us, ton_uk.

tools.name: convert_temperature
tools.description: Convert between temperature units: celsius, fahrenheit, kelvin, rankine.

tools.name: convert_currency_data
tools.description: Convert currency using static reference rates (for estimation only). Use live API for production.
